title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Kozhikode

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Kozhikode
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIM Kozhikode. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About IIM Kozhikode:
IIM Kozhikode is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Kozhikode!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
